question.title: Admob slow down app
question.body:
I programmed a game for android in libGDX and I added ads to my app but they slowed it down. CPU usage has increased to ~30%. What should I do? This is my code of this guide:

public void setupAds() {
    bannerAd = new AdView(this);
    bannerAd.setVisibility(View.INVISIBLE);
    bannerAd.setBackgroundColor(Color.BLACK);
    bannerAd.setAdUnitId(BANNER_AD_UNIT_ID);
    bannerAd.setAdSize(AdSize.BANNER);
}

@Override
public void showBannerAd() {
    runOnUiThread(new Runnable() {
        @Override
        public void run() {
            bannerAd.setVisibility(View.VISIBLE);
            AdRequest.Builder builder = new AdRequest.Builder();
            AdRequest ad = builder.build();
            bannerAd.loadAd(ad);
        }
    });
}
